wiki.title: Tobaro
wiki.description: Tobaro, formally the Principality of Tobaro, or Tolarie as it was known to the High Elves, is also called the " City of Sirens " or sometimes the " City of Fools ", and is the only great Tilean city-state on the western shores of the Tilean Sea. The city is also said in some sources, confusingly, to be called " Vedenza the True " by those who love her. [Note 1]

wiki.title: Miragliano
wiki.description: Miragliano, officially the Mighty Principality of Miragliano and also known known as " Miragliano the Serene ", is one of the most powerful city-states in Tilea, famed for its expert crossbowmen; Miragliano is a bastion of defiance against the Skaven hordes of the Under-Empire.

wiki.title: Remas
wiki.description: Remas, officially the Republic of Remas and sometimes called the " Rebellious Republic of Remas ", is a large, prosperous, and ancient city-state located on the western coast of central Tilea. Remas is believed by some academics to have once been the heart and capital city of the ancient Reman Empire, which is thought to have ruled over the southern realms of the Old World, including all of Tilea and Estalia.

wiki.title: Luccini
wiki.description: Luccini, also spelled Lucini, formally the Ancient Principality of Luccini, is considered the oldest city in Tilea, at least according to the people that live there. Founded upon the ruins of an ancient High Elven city in the year 1 IC, by the legendary twins, Lucan and Luccina, king and queen of a tribe of nomadic shepherds who settled on the famous Elf -built Acropolis and built their palace at its summit. No wonder that the name of the city itself is taken from that of its first queen.

wiki.title: Scorcio
wiki.description: Scorcio is a small town in the sun-blessed land of Tilea, and was the location of the Battle of Scorcio. It is not known when this battle took place and who fought against whom, but the location of the battlefield is marked on Tilean maps. The town is ruled by the Principality of Trantio, and lies north of that city between the Trantine Hills and the Gulf of Pearls.

wiki.title: Sartosa
wiki.description: Sartosa, formally the Decadent Pirate Principality of Sartosa, known more politely by its swashbuckling inhabitants as the Free City of Sartosa or simply the " City of Pirates," by nearly everyone else, is an anarchic island-stronghold controlled by pirates located south of war-torn Tilea, off the coast of the Tilean city-state of Luccini. This island is a notorious haven for criminals, harbouring all manner of pirates, brigands, lawless mercenaries and anyone else wanting to avoid the notice of the various legitimate powers of the Old World.

wiki.title: Udolpho
wiki.description: Udolpho is a Tilean hamlet of the Principality of Miragliano located near the village of Zeluco. It is reviled as the haunted estate of the House of Udolpho. Some maps of the 23rd century IC indicate Udolpho was once part of the territory of the Principality of Tobaro, on a road which links the weastern city-state with Miragliano.

wiki.title: Ebino
wiki.description: Ebino is a Tilean town located in the Principality of Miragliano. The town was built on the River Arena which connects it to Toscania and Ravola to the north. Ebino was originally a fan-made settlement created by the freelance writer Alfred Nuñez Jr..

wiki.title: Ciabbatta
wiki.description: Ciabbatta, is a poor Tilean village controlled by the Republic of Verezzo. Ciabatta is renowned as the site of a famed battle in Tilea in which Gossippa Lotta ordered his cannons set up on the flanks of his army, which proved to be very advantageous compared to the general's original battle plan -- where they were placed together in the middle of the battleline.

wiki.title: Toscania
wiki.description: A map depicting the Principality of Miragliano in northern Tilea at the time of the Anarchy in ca. 2276 IC. Toscania is a poor village in the north of Tilea south of the Novalone Pass and to the west of Campogrotta. A Dwarf trading post has been established here.

wiki.title: Ravola
wiki.description: Ravola is a bustling Tilean town under Miragliano 's domain, famous for its vineyards which are considered the finest in all Tilea. In 1425 IC, the Prince of Miragliano started negotiations with the Bretonnians under the leadership of the Baron du Bors to end the repeated attacks by Bretonnian nobles on the territory of Tilea.

wiki.title: Firento
wiki.description: Firento is a northern Tilean town located between the Gulf of Pearls and the Tettoverde Wood in the domain of the Principality of Trantio. Firento is the only Tilean town added to the Warhammer: The Old World interactive map by Games Workshop not originally created by MadAlfred.

wiki.title: Stiani
wiki.description: Stiani is an inland Tilean town located on the road known as the Via Aurelia, which lies between the larger settlements of Remas and Astiano. The town is ruled by the Republic of Remas. Stiani was originally a fan-made settlement created by the freelance writer Alfred Nuñez Jr..

wiki.title: Catrazza
wiki.description: Catrazza is a prosperous Tilean town of the Republic of Remas. The famous mercenary company known as the Birdmen of Catrazza got their name in this town thanks to their great deed. Despite being guarded by many crossbowmen, they succeeded on behalf of a certain Alfeo Romeo of Remas to rescue his lover Isabella Dellecta from the tower.

wiki.title: Urbimo
wiki.description: Urbimo, also known as Urbino, is a large port town in north-eastern Tilea located on the Sea of Trantio that has been ruled in the past by the Republic of Remas, but is currently (as of 2517 IC ) under the control of the Principality of Trantio. It is Trantio's primary outlet on the Tilean Sea.

wiki.title: Varieno
wiki.description: Varieno is an inland Tilean town of the Principality of Trantio on the border of the Trantine Hills. Varieno was originally a fan-made settlement created by the freelance writer Alfred Nuñez Jr.. The town was later confirmed in Warhammer canon with the release of Warhammer: The Old World.

wiki.title: Monte Negro
wiki.description: Monte Negro is a bustling Tilean town located near the city-state of Remas. It is the birthplace of Prince Giovanni Lanfranchi, once home to the Priory of the Spear -- a former priory of a Myrmidian order of vampire hunters that is now an institution affiliated with the Morrite Fellowship of the Shroud.

wiki.title: Rifraffa
wiki.description: Rifraffa, also sometimes mistakenly spelled Riffraffa, is a Tilean coastal village on the Bay of Remas controlled by the Republic of Remas, famous as the site of the Battle of Rifraffa.

wiki.title: Olesi
wiki.description: Olesi is a port town of the Republic of Verezzo in western Tilea on the Olesi Coast. It acts as an outlet to the Tilean Sea for otherwise land-locked Verezzo. The Tilean Sea as depicted in Man O' War: Corsair.

wiki.title: Verezzo
wiki.description: Verezzo, formally the Serene Republic of Verezzo, is a wealthy, Tilean city-state located at the centre of the peninsula. As with Pavona, Verezzo lives pretty much in the shadow of its powerful rivals, especially Remas and Luccini, which have a direct outlet on the Tilean Sea.

wiki.title: Raverno
wiki.description: Raverno is a Tilean town located inland between the cities of Luccini and Verezzo. The town is controlled by the Republic of Verezzo. Raverno was originally a fan-made settlement created by the freelance writer Alfred Nuñez Jr..

wiki.title: Aldente
wiki.description: Aldente is an inland town of southern Tilea under the control of the Principality of Luccini. It was the site of a battle at the Plain of Luccini on the southern tip of the peninsula near Cappo Cinno.

wiki.title: Pavezzano
wiki.description: Pavezzano is a port town of the Principality of Luccini in southern Tilea, located on the Black Gulf. The Tilean Sea as depicted in Man O' War: Corsair. Each location's name matches those used in the game.

wiki.title: Capelli
wiki.description: Capelli is an inland town located south of the Sussurrio Wood in southern Tilea under the control of the Principality of Luccini. Capelli was originally a fan-made settlement created by the freelance writer Alfred Nuñez Jr.. The town was mentioned for the first time in Warhammer: The Old World.

wiki.title: Scozzese
wiki.description: Scozzese is a small, independent Tilean city-state allied with Pavona. The " Men With No Names " are a group of Roadwardens who patrol the highway between Scozzese and Remas. They are revered in stories and songs by the locals.

wiki.title: Pavona
wiki.description: Pavona, officially the Principality of Pavona, sometimes referred to by outsiders as the "Perfidious Principality of Pavona", is a prosperous city-state situated in central Tilea. Located almost in the exact centre of Tilea, south of the Trantine Hills on the fertile plains between the River Remo and the Apuccini Mountains, Pavona is blessed by a much milder climate than the lands of the Empire, enjoying almost year round the kindly favours of the warm Tilean sun.

wiki.title: Trantio
wiki.description: Trantio, formally known as the Principality of Trantio, is an upstart, prosperous and turbulent Tilean city-state. A variation of the heraldry of Trantio as shown on a flag of the Trantian Navy as depicted in Man O' War: Corsair and Total War: Warhammer.

wiki.title: Campogrotta
wiki.description: Campogrotta is a Tilean town of the Principality of Miragliano, located near the entrance of the Alimento Tunnel below The Vaults. A community of Dwarfs have settled here. The Alimento Tunnel is a great cavern and river system that is the source of both the River Söll in the Empire, and the Cristallo River in Tilea, which leads to Campogrotta through the River of Echoes.

wiki.title: Pugno
wiki.description: Pugno is a small Tilean town located inside the domains of the Republic of Verezzo, between the Bay of Wrecks and the upper reaches of the River Luparno, at the foot of the southeast end of the Apuccini Mountains and north of the Monte Castello fortress.

wiki.title: Monte Castello
wiki.description: Monte Castello is a prosperous fortress-monastery set above the Bay of Wrecks of the Black Gulf that is among the greatest strongholds in the Known World. Of the many sieges that have unfolded in the strife-torn land of Tilea, the siege of Monte Castello is surely the most famous. At the height of the conflict, five hundred Tilean mercenaries held this fortress-monastery against ten thousand Orcs.

wiki.title: Viadaza
wiki.description: Viadaza is a port town of north-eastern Tilea located on the Gulf of Pearls, ruled by the Principality of Miragliano (as of 2517 IC ). During the Anarchy in the Empire in ca. 2276 IC, Viadaza was governed by the Principality of Trantio.

wiki.title: Astiano
wiki.description: Astiano is a Tilean town located on the border between the Republic of Remas and the Principality of Pavona. The town is located within the Principality of Pavona. The settlement was built on the River Remo which connects it to both city-states.

wiki.title: Terenne
wiki.description: Terenne is a Tilean town located near the Apuccini Mountains in the Republic of Verezzo. The settlement was built near a tributary of the River Riati which connects it to Verezzo, Spomanti and Remas.

wiki.title: Alcatani
wiki.description: Alcatani is a poor Tilean hamlet but rich with apples, citrus, vines and olive trees that was once administered by the landowner Roderigo Delmonte. Alcatani's orchards were razed to the ground by the mercenary general, El Cadavo during the 20th century IC. This threw the formerly wealthy Roderigo into poverty, pushing him to become a mercenary along with his workforce, thus forming the renowned Alcatani Fellowship mercenary company.

wiki.title: Alimento
wiki.description: Alimento is a Tilean cavern-town under the Principality of Miragliano, more specifically positioned in the middle of the Alimento Tunnel under The Vaults. Many adventurers among which the famous mercenaries Gotrek and Felix, have heard of an ancient treasure hidden somewhere In the dwarven ruins beneath what Is now Alimento. Rumours speak about a hidden passage, age-old traps and infiltrating Skaven.

wiki.title: Alvazzo
wiki.description: Alvazzo is either a Tilean or Border Princes fort located near the Apuccini Mountains foothills that was once ruled by the Duke of Alvazzo.

wiki.title: Anducci
wiki.description: Anducci is a poor Tilean hamlet on the Tilean Sea within the domain of the Principality of Luccini. In the past, Dark Elven Shades from the Black Ark Tower of Oblivion stole all the children of the village during the night. Afterwards, the Black Ark's commander, Randelle Doomwhisper, ransomed them back to their parents.

wiki.title: Apesto
wiki.description: Apesto is an ancient Tilean town. The town was saved from a series of terrible earthquakes by the late and respected Master Chanter Alric, "the Saviour of Apesto." Alric was aided in the ritual to stop the earthquakes by two other wizards from the Light Order, Apprentice Steiger and Brother Hetzer.

wiki.title: Amato
wiki.description: Amato is a poor Tilean hamlet in the Principality of Miragliano. Its known to be always blessed by clean springs. The early Tileans were lucky that their lands remained largely free of monstrous creatures but in 475 IC a vast horde of Orcs and Goblins invaded from the east.

wiki.title: Beronna
wiki.description: Beronna is a town of the sunny land of Tilea in the Old World. Beronna is likely located near Pavona. During the End Times a trio of Stormfiends known as the Blackfire Warpack set half the town alight, as they strode down the street with arms outstretched, their Warpfire Throwers blasting out on either side.

wiki.title: Castolino
wiki.description: Castolino is a town on the slopes of the Trantine Hills in the Tilean Principality of Trantio. During the siege of the town, the forces of the renegade Prince of Castolino Salvatore hurled themselves against the ancient walls of the town to reclaim his right to rule. During the ferocious siege even Torben Badenov 's mercenary band reclaimed part of the glory during the fight, even if for which side is unknown.

wiki.title: Ciarascura
wiki.description: Ciarascura is a bustling Tilean town of the Republic of Remas. The town is home to an old, bent tower commanded by the tyrannical Castellan Dellecta. The town was besieged by a mercenary army in the service of the city-state of Remas.

wiki.title: Decimas
wiki.description: Decimas is a small Tilean village north of the city-state of Miragliano.

wiki.title: Ducieso
wiki.description: Ducieso is a quiet Tilean town in the Trantine Hills near the city-state of Trantio, famed for its skillful stonecutters and for the strange disappearance of its prince, Frenzo Badolphus, a gifted astronomer and astromancer.

wiki.title: Escantos
wiki.description: The city of Escantos in southern Tilea was completely destroyed by rats in 1601 IC.

wiki.title: Etobrutti
wiki.description: Etobrutti is a poor hamlet under the influence of the Principality of Miragliano, and once protected by the Principality of Pavona in Tilea. It was the site of the battle of Etobrutti, where the forces of Pavona defeated those of Verezzo.

wiki.title: Lumbrusco
wiki.description: Lumbrusco, sometimes spelled Lambrusco, was once a Tilean city-state located near the Apuccini Mountains. It was ruled by Duke Fabriano of Lumbrusco.

wiki.title: Molto
wiki.description: The location of the city-state of Tobaro among the Isles of the Sirens in north-western Tilea. The neighbourhoods of the Tilean city-state of Tobaro have their own sub-regions and those of the Trafuro are particularly varied. There are communities that dwell somewhat beyond the protection of Tobaro, and one of these is Molto.

wiki.title: Montorri
wiki.description: Montorri is a small Tilean village not far from Miragliano. The thief Riano 's uncle lived here.

wiki.title: Mironia
wiki.description: Mironia was a small town in Tilea near the Zombie Swamps before being razed to ground by the Skaven. During a very foggy night, the settlement was attacked by a large number of Skaven, with first several city patrols being secretly eliminated. Captain Rizzilo was finally able to make out some hooded figures with red sparkling eyes, but was probably killed by them immediately.

wiki.title: Motta Zorella
wiki.description: Motta Zorella is a simple Tilean villagge under the Republic of Remas. The battle of Motta Zorella was the first conflict were the Birdmen of Catrazza were employed. They achieved victory by attacking the enemy general from the air and dragging them into captivity without his army being able to prevent them.

wiki.title: Nonucci
wiki.description: A map of the Tilean Sea as depicted in Man O' War: Corsair. Each location's name matches those used in the game. The symbols depicting which faction is patrolling each area represents their positions in 2517 IC but are subject to minor changes as the game's campaign progresses. [Note 1]

wiki.title: Organza
wiki.description: Located in the Apuccini Mountains, Organza is a city-state in Tilea ruled by a duke. Said duke tried to form an alliance with the nearby city of Lumbrusco, asking its ruler, Fabriano of Lumbrusco, to get rid of his most formidable and therefore unpredictable mercenary unit, the company of Ennio Mordini.

wiki.title: Pattio
wiki.description: Pattio is a poor Tilean village of the Principality of Luccini located on the Tilean Sea. Pattio was the site of the Battle of Pattio where Bronzino's Galloper Guns were used in battle for the first time by Borgio the Besieger.

wiki.title: Piacanca
wiki.description: Piacanca is a Tilean settlement. The latest shop of the unscrupulous merchant Alfredo Landi Naddeo, named simply Alfredo's, has been opened recently in Piacanca Plaza. The place is like a cavern, crammed with goods.

wiki.title: Piza
wiki.description: Piza was the site of a major battle in Tilea that was won by a mercenary general named Sandro, thanks to the military instructions of his advisor, Gossippa Lotta, she showed him how to properly use regiments of pikemen on the battlefield.

wiki.title: Portomaggiore
wiki.description: Portomaggiore is a large port town of the Republic of Verezzo located on the Sea of Verezzo and serves as its primary outlet on the Tilean Sea. The Tilean Sea as depicted in Man O' War: Corsair. Each location's name matches those used in the game.

wiki.title: Riccotta
wiki.description: Riccotta is a Tilean poor village. Riccotta is reknown for a siege, the defenders included Ogres and Halflings. Since Gossippa Lotta was of the opinion that they would eat twice, if not three times as much as the other mercenaries, she urged the ogres and halflings to get their extra rations, and supplies for the remaining defenders, from the besieging troops.

wiki.title: Scintio
wiki.description: Scintio is an average village in Tilea under the Principality of Remas. The Alcatani Fellowship fought for its people when it was just a poor village in the 21th century, although the residents could not afford to pay them.

wiki.title: Sileno
wiki.description: Sileno is a Tilean town that suffered from a failed Skaven attack later known as the Liberation of Sileno. During the battle, the mercenaries of Liotta's Legion played a vital role in defending the settlement.

wiki.title: Terramorta
wiki.description: Terramorta is a poor Tilean hamlet of the Principality of Trantio and the site of a battle fought before Leopold's Leopard Company made a groundbreaking decision: they vowed to donate part of their income as mercenaries for the reconstruction of the Temple of Lucan and Luccina they had looted in their hometown of Luccini. Since then, the Leopards' luck in battles has become legendary.

wiki.title: Torrico
wiki.description: Torrico is a tipical village in the sunblessed land of Tilea under the influence of the Principality of Trantio. The infamous Hobgoblin mercenaries General Ghazak Khan made his name as the "Butcher of Torrico Fields" here. The Population is still recovering from his raids.

wiki.title: Varenna
wiki.description: Varenna is a typical Tilean village near the city-state of Trantio that produces grain and wool, but its history is much older and more troubled than one might think. Varenna was originally a town in early Tilea that was destroyed during the Orc and Goblin incursions between 475 and 978 IC. According to legend, the defending mercenary general Justintine of Varenna was the first to come up with the idea of taking the army's treasures in a treasure chest onto the battlefield, as the walls of the town had collapsed as a result of an earthquake and the town could therefore not be held.

wiki.title: Vennia
wiki.description: Vennia, also called Venni, is a poor Tilean village of the Republic of Remas. [Note 1] Vennia was the location of the so-called Battle of Villa Vennia, one of the three great battles which saw Borgio the Besieger defeat the forces of the city-state of Remas.

wiki.title: Veddia
wiki.description: Veddia is a poor Tilean hamlet, also known for the Veddia is renown as the location of the Battle of Via Veddia one of the three great battles which saw Prince Borgio the Besieger of Miragliano as the winner against his rival city-states of Tilea.

wiki.title: Viccia
wiki.description: Viccia is a poor Tilean hamlet of the Principality of Trantio. Viccia was the location of the Battle of Vittoria Viccia, one of the three great battles which saw Borgio the Besieger defeat the forces of the city-state of Trantio.

wiki.title: Villa da Vincia
wiki.description: Villa da Vincia is a Tilean hamlet placed on the edge of the Trantine Hills and the Appentine Forest, on the way to the city of Trantio. The area has suffered greatly from Beastmen raids to the point that the authorities have paid for entire mercenary armies to deal with the threat.

wiki.title: Zeluco
wiki.description: Zeluco, sometime spelled Zelucco, is a wealthy Tilean village of the Principality of Miragliano. It is known mainly for the fearsome and labyrinthine dungeons under Duce Montoni di Zeluco 's fortress.

wiki.title: Tramaglino
wiki.description: Tramaglino is a northern Tilean town not far from the city-state of Miragliano. During the alternate timeline of the Storm of Chaos, Tramaglino was destroyed by the Skaven on 17 Brumoso, 2522 IC. Some survivors of the slaughter made their way to Miragliano.

wiki.title: Cammaro
wiki.description: Cammaro was a Tilean village razed to the ground by a Skaven assault. Its entire population vanished following the ratmen 's assault in 2511 IC. After the murder of one of the richest merchant-traders of Cammaro, chaos erupted in the village.

wiki.title: Parmis
wiki.description: Parmis was a Tilean city before an attack from the Skaven razed it to the ground in 2512 IC. Sometime before the year 2313 IC, the city of Parmis found itself under siege for sixteen harrowing days, assailed by a jealous rival city-state of Tilea.

wiki.title: Cera-Scuro
wiki.description: Not to be confused with the Island of Ciarascura. A poor hamlet in Tilean territory, Cera-Scuro was previously a lair of pirates in the Isles of the Sirens, recently conquered by Tobaro. Borgio the besieger was well pleased with Braganaz's Besiegers as an elitè mercenary troop and offered to find them work in return for a cut of their profits.

wiki.title: Vedenza
wiki.description: Vedenza, officially the Second Republic of Vedenza, is a small, vibrant city-state of Tilea located on the border with Estalia. Vedenza was recently reconquered from Estalian rule and is now under the influence of the much larger city-state of Tobaro, which, according to Imperial scholar Theodosius Schreiber, is itself confusingly called "Vedenza the True" by those who truly love her. [Note 1]

wiki.title: Mintopua
wiki.description: Mintopua, also spelled Minotupa, is a port town of the Principality of Luccini in southern Tilea and is the closest mainland Tilean settlement to the pirate island of Sartosa. It lies on the Pirate's Current.
